title: ShopEnchantMe
description: ShopEnchantMe is a GUI-based enchantment shop addon for EnchantMe. Players can browse and purchase enchant books directly from an in-game shop menu using in-game currency via Vault.
body:

# 🛒 ShopEnchantMe

**GUI-based enchantment shop for your server — browse, search, and buy custom enchant books with in-game money.**

ShopEnchantMe is an addon for EnchantMe that lets players purchase enchant books directly from a clean in-game shop menu. No commands to memorize, no admin manually giving books — players browse by category, check prices, and buy with their balance.

---

## 🖥️ Shop Features

- **Category browser** — Sword, Bow, Armor, Tool, and Special in separate menus
- **Search** — Find enchants by name or description directly from chat
- **Sort** — Sort enchants by your preference
- **Balance display** — Player balance shown directly inside the GUI
- **Confirm screen** — Optional purchase confirmation before buying (can be disabled in config)
- **Price per level** — Every enchant level has its own price, all configurable in `config.yml`

---

## 🔧 Commands

| Command | Permission | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `/eshop` | `shopenchantme.use` | Open the enchantment shop |
| `/eshopreload` | `shopenchantme.admin` | Reload prices from config |

---

## ⚙️ Config

All enchant prices can be changed in `config.yml`:

```yaml
shop:
  currency-symbol: "$"
  main-title: "§6§lEnchantment Shop"
  confirm-purchase: false

prices:
  lifesteal:
    1: 2000
    2: 4500
    3: 9000
```

---


## ⚠️ Requirements

This plugin **will not run** without the following dependencies:

- 🔗 **[EnchantMe](https://modrinth.com/plugin/enchantme)** — The main enchantment plugin
- 💰 **[Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/) 1.7.3** + an economy plugin (e.g. EssentialsX)

---

*Made by **herza***
